tweets.text:
Now today was a proper liquidation day. I didn't know if it came all at once or bled slowly over the next week (like 2018, bled for 2-weeks).

Let the burden of proof show that this MOU can reverse the deficit.

Note: November 5, 2018 saw Trump grant extensions on the Iranian oil sanctions that led to one of the largest speculator positioning washouts in oil market history. 

Oil inventories did not decline during this period.
tweets.full_text:
Now today was a proper liquidation day. I didn't know if it came all at once or bled slowly over the next week (like 2018, bled for 2-weeks).

Let the burden of proof show that this MOU can reverse the deficit.

Note: November 5, 2018 saw Trump grant extensions on the Iranian oil sanctions that led to one of the largest speculator positioning washouts in oil market history. 

Oil inventories did not decline during this period.

tweets.text: Goods prices in the U.S. are soaring. Import prices shot up 1.9% in May. That’s an annualized rate of over 25%. YoY import prices rose 6.7%. Export prices jumped 1.3% in May and are up 11.2% YoY. Import and export prices are a far more accurate measure of inflation than the CPI.

thread_tweets.text: Goods prices in the U.S. are soaring. Import prices shot up 1.9% in May. That’s an annualized rate of over 25%. YoY import prices rose 6.7%. Export prices jumped 1.3% in May and are up 11.2% YoY. Import and export prices are a far more accurate measure of inflation than the CPI.
thread_tweets.full_text: Goods prices in the U.S. are soaring. Import prices shot up 1.9% in May. That’s an annualized rate of over 25%. YoY import prices rose 6.7%.
